_doc: CANONICAL program state — the SINGLE source for the auto-generated status blocks. Edit THIS, then run `python3 tools/render_state.py --write` to refresh every <!-- BEGIN GENERATED:* --> block across the context docs (README, SESSION_BOOTSTRAP, SESSION_CHECKPOINT, EXPERIMENT_RUNBOOK §0.3, PROGRESS ⑤). Never hand-edit between the GENERATED markers. This is the 'generate-what's-mechanical' half of the anti-drift design (the other half = narrative fingerprints in tools/closeout_fingerprints.json). The pre-commit hook blocks commits where these blocks are stale vs this file.
north_star: F1 — prove/falsify the 'LLM-as-Database' spec is implementable BEFORE it is built; deliver a ready / not-ready-with-conditions determination. Falsification-first.
current_latest: **F1 READ-CONTRACT/NATIVE-KNOWING SLICE COMPLETE + SYNTHESIZED (2026-06-25).** 6 experiments closed-out (C1-(a)/R2/R3/R13/R5/R5b, CORPUS/26-30 + R3-screening) -> folded into the north-star verdict (`docs/F1_DETERMINATION.md`). **F1 = NOT-READY-WITH-CONDITIONS (net readiness unchanged).** Read contract CHARACTERIZED, NOT delivered, along the **weights<->index seam** (bifurcation): (a) weight-native native-knowing TOWARD-SATISFIED, **CONDITIONED on no-pretrained-prior subjects** — robust for code/structural inserts (R5 100%) + re-edits (R5b 94%), fragile-but-recipe-rescuable for common-knowledge-overlapping facts (R13/R5 22-25%->65% paraphrase-diverse); axis = pretrained-prior presence not edit-count (R5b). (b) structured-query reads (reverse R2/delete R9/closed-world R6) confirmed **NOT weight-native -> obligation RELOCATED to the `.vindex`/index/query layer (prototyped-not-empirical, largely unbuilt)** — confirming-delegated != delivered. C1-(a): compaction corruption = scale x sub-batching interaction (pressures, != falsifies, B3N cond-3). All NOT-promoted (N<=24/1-seed/capital/fictional/band[4-8]/3B).
next_actions: FRONTIER (operator-steer; read-contract slice is DONE+synthesized — further experiments there are low marginal value). In rough priority:

(1) BUILD + empirically test the INDEX/QUERY LAYER — now LOAD-BEARING (the structured-query burden relocated here per R2/R6/R9/§11.2): deployed SELECT triple-readback (R1, CP2 at-risk), the 5 query families (R3 expression screened clean but querying untested), aggregation/negation (R7), multi-hop (R8), namespace (R4), provenance (R16). Prototyped-not-empirical = same status as governance; was mis-sized earlier as cheap ungated legs.

(2) C1 compaction-at-TRUE-scale (sharpest write-side falsifier) — stimulus-gated: needs a real MULTI-DOMAIN single-token pool OR an explicit fictional confound (country/Knowledge caps ~78 entities). OPERATOR SCOPE CALL (sets GPU hours).
(3) GOVERNANCE/SECURITY/PRUNING (C5/C6/C7) — prototyped not empirical, security not red-teamed, Pruning/GC untouched (Phase-2 fault-injection/red-team).

(4) Lower-value empirical cells: real-subject-re-edit (predicted ~PRIOR); powered diversity-vs-intensity run (before any recipe amendment); 7B numeric transfer (C4); relation-generality beyond capital.

STANDING: re-auth codex/gpt-5.5 (refresh_token_reused; Perplexity-Sonar = working cross-family fallback). Guardrails: spec-first · pre-register + advisor before build AND before verdict · name-the-manipulated-variable · cross-family on interpretation-subtle results (waive on decisive).
f1_verdict: DETERMINATION DRAFTED 2026-06-24 (`docs/F1_DETERMINATION.md`) = **NOT-READY-WITH-CONDITIONS** (draft-with-open-conditions, NOT a clean close; shippable as the honest current state). Deployment data-path spine PROVEN-FOR-SCOPE (recipe→A1 batch-clean→B3 Q4_K_M→E1·A CPU-serve; 3B/N≤100/band[4-8]/single-batch/1-seed/fictional). Architecture = scope-keyed COMPACTION-BOUNDED HYBRID (D-B3N-1), in-weight a serving copy per the verified §11.2/D42 structural finding (no class weights-authoritative). Determination carries a 10-row CONDITIONS REGISTER of first-class falsifiers: C1 compaction-at-scale (sharpest; D20 directionally negative) · C2 read-contract (biggest gap) · C3 R5-at-scale · C4 7B numeric transfer (OQ-W1) · C5 governance+orchestration (prototyped-not-empirical) · C6 security (un-red-teamed) · C7 Pruning/GC (untouched) · C8 R15-adversarial · C9 R9-native-deletion · C10 multi-token/G7. C1/C2 closing negative would move the verdict toward not-implementable-as-specified. Closure-path lead = UNGATED `tools/power.py` pool-sizing.

scorecard.deployment_path: recipe ✅ → A1 batch-clean ✅ → B3 Q4_K_M-survival ✅ → E1·A CPU-serve ✅ → D1 structural ✅ (model-general) + numeric k≤1 SET on 3B ⚠️ (cross-model transfer OPEN)

Remaining frontier: C1 compaction-at-true-scale (stimulus-gated) · index/query layer build+test (load-bearing) · C5/C6/C7 governance/security/pruning (Phase-2) · C4 7B transfer
scorecard.read_contract: CHARACTERIZED along weights↔index seam (2026-06-25, CORPUS/26-30): native-knowing weight-native + ROBUST for no-pretrained-prior facts (insert R5 100%, re-edit R5b 94%), fragile-but-recipe-rescuable vs pretrained priors (R13/R5 22-25%→65% diverse); structured-query (reverse R2/delete R9/closed-world R6) confirmed NOT weight-native → index-delegated; index/query layer (R1/R4/R7/R8/R11/R16) UNTESTED + prototyped-not-empirical = load-bearing
